title: Google Antigravity 2.0 Beginner's Guide
summary: Google Antigravity 2.0 is a standalone desktop application that enables multi-agent teams, scheduled tasks, native voice interaction, and one-click integration with Google products. It aims to deliver an agent-optimized user experience.
